epic.name: Epic Sandbox
epic.description: Standard Epic Systems FHIR Interconnect Sandbox.
epic.patient_scopes: launch/patient openid profile offline_access patient/Patient.read patient/MedicationRequest.read patient/Observation.read
epic.provider_scopes: launch openid profile patient/Patient.read patient/MedicationRequest.read patient/Observation.read patient/Observation.write patient/Encounter.read

cerner.name: Cerner Sandbox
cerner.patient_scopes: patient/Patient.read patient/Observation.read patient/MedicationRequest.read launch/patient online_access offline_access openid profile
cerner.provider_scopes: launch openid profile patient/Patient.read patient/MedicationRequest.read patient/Observation.read patient/Observation.write patient/Encounter.read
